blended.narrative: Mont-Sauvage (Owl's Head) is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 8,590 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
